mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_role where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_role (biz_id, user_biz_id, role_code, scope_code, effective_from, effective_to, created_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{roleCode}, #{scopeCode}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{effectiveTo}, #{createdAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update role_code = values(role_code), scope_code = values(scope_code), effective_from = values(effective_from), effective_to = values(effective_to), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_role set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
